text.text:
An exceptionally good meal; the flavor combinations were outstanding, the veggies and herbs were fresh, and the meat and seafood were cooked perfectly. I ordered the Sesame Chicken Pot Stickers and the La V Vermicelli Bowl and both were extremely delicious.

The staff were friendly and attentive, and it felt like they enjoyed working there. I sat outside and never felt forgotten. I told my server how extra good the food was and he said it’s a bunch of Vietnamese grandmothers cooking, so everything that comes out of the kitchen is great. As an added bonus the plating was aesthetically pleasing.

Highly recommend this restaurant; if I’m in the city again I would definitely come back!

text.text: The food was exceptional. I never had Fresh Rolls as delicious as these. The peanut sauce they are served with takes them to another level. I had the Oxtail Pho and it was very good. The broth was very savory. There was plenty of meat on those bones and very tender. I couldn’t eat all the food. Thuy was an excellent host. The service was very attentive: I dropped my chopsticks and the waiter gave me a new pair before I had time to say anything.

text.text:
I recently dined here w a friend & was absolutely, astounded by the incredible flavors incorporated into my dish. We were greeted by a kind & animated hostess, by the name of ‘Twee’ or ‘Thuy’. She’d given hospitality, enthusiasm & professionalism. Super confident & passionate she was, I felt comfortable trusting her w the knowledge she possessed ab the menu & specific cuisines. Adding this restaurant to one of the top places to dine at in downtown St. Pete.
:))

text.text:
Downtown St. Petersburg is a beautiful place to live, work, and play, and much of that charm comes from the unique character the city radiates. Few places capture that spirit better than La V Vietnamese Fusion.

La V is one of those special places that brings warmth, friendliness, and comfort to everyone who walks through its doors. The owner, Thuy, welcomes guests as if they were entering her own home. The food is flavorful and authentic, and the prices are very reasonable—especially the lunch specials.

As our city continues to grow, we risk losing some of the character that makes downtown so special. Growth is important, but it shouldn’t come at the cost of the places that helped shape our community. We need places like La V Vietnamese Fusion. Without them, we risk losing the very essence of what makes St. Petersburg, Florida such a wonderful place to live, work, and play. 🌴✨

text.text: This is a nice restaurant for decent Vietnamese meal.  I enjoyed the short rib Pho. The others in my party had the La V salad and a shrimp soup 🍲 . We also had bao buns (delicious).

text.text:
Diners like this restaurant's authentic Vietnamese cuisine, especially the flavorful pho, fresh spring rolls, and diverse vegetarian options. They also highlight the friendly and attentive service, welcoming atmosphere, and reasonable prices.

Some reviews mention the food can be overpriced.
